use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING ATTENTION DEFICIT HYPERACTIVITY DISORDER (ADHD)

indications.text:
APTENSIO XR is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in patients 6 years and
older [see Clinical Studies (14)].
Limitations of Use
The use of Aptensio XR is not recommended in pediatric patients younger than 6 years of age because they had higher
